title: ophrys sphegodes subsp. oodicheila
intro: Ophrys sphegodes subsp. oodicheila, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ophrys sphegodes subsp. oodicheila include reducing inflammation, relieving muscle spasms, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
